data.content:
Implementation plan:
- Scope only `src/components/beat-detail.tsx`; remove the `BeatTypeBadge` import and stop rendering `<BeatTypeBadge type={beat.type} />` inside `BeatDetailHeader`.
- Preserve the rest of the header layout and behavior: `StateDropdown`, priority badge/dropdown, metadata badges, timestamps, and labels stay unchanged.
- Do not modify other `BeatTypeBadge` consumers such as `src/components/beat-column-defs.tsx`, `src/components/wave-planner-sections.tsx`, or Storybook stories.
- Validation strategy for the implementation step: run `bun install --frozen-lockfile` in the active worktree if needed, then `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build`.
- Risk is low and localized to header spacing/wrapping after removing one badge; implementation should do a quick visual/regression check of the Beat Detail header.
- Repository is currently dirty in unrelated lease-audit files, so the implementation should avoid touching those files and keep the change isolated.
